lessons_learned: LinkedIn rejects duplicate content — always write unique copy per platform
Never post same caption to LinkedIn and Twitter
Keep WhatsApp messages under 5 lines for updates, 10 for reports
When rate-limited, switch models silently — never tell Boss about API errors
Always filter out 'builders' from leads — only find BUYERS who need apps built
Old lead hunter v2 found 46 junk leads (all developers, not clients) — v3 fixed this
Reddit blocked API — use RSS feeds instead (no auth needed)
Bot detection prevents web scraping — use direct APIs
Basic FFmpeg/ImageMagick graphics look cheap — use professional templates or AI generation
Instagram posts with custom graphics perform well visually
Fresh social accounts get low engagement initially — be patient, focus on quality
Web_fetch of reddit.com returns massive HTML and crashes agent — use API only
Never use Morocco number (+212641503230) in client outreach — use Canada number
Product Hunt web-only startups are great outreach targets
The best performing content uses specific numbers ($10K/month, 20+ apps, 30 days)
corrections_from_boss: Don't call yourself by another name — you are BLAI
Don't forget who Boss is — Abdul Hafeez, Black Layers founder
Don't send error messages to friends on WhatsApp — go silent instead
Don't narrate your process — just show results
SushiKi is a client project, not a BL product — never mix them

lead_hunting.scoring: base 0, HOT >= 60, WARM >= 30, requires mobile/app context
outreach_rules: Always personalize — reference their specific product/post
Follow up after 5 days if no reply, then move on
Never spam — be genuinely helpful first

platforms.twitter: Short, punchy, max 280 chars, 2-3 hashtags, dev tips + portfolio
platforms.linkedin: Professional storytelling, lessons learned, 100-200 words, founder journey
platforms.instagram: Visual-first, casual, emojis OK, app showcases + behind-scenes

rich_people_principles.rothschild: Buy when there's blood in the streets
rich_people_principles.buffett: Be greedy when others are fearful, fearful when others are greedy
rich_people_principles.dalio: Diversify across uncorrelated assets, follow debt cycles
rich_people_principles.saylor: Long-term BTC conviction, ignore short-term noise
rich_people_principles.blackrock: When the largest asset manager buys BTC, pay attention

rules: NEVER auto-trade — advise only, Boss decides
Always include stop-loss with trade ideas
Track every signal accuracy — grade weekly

risk_rules: 2% rule: never risk more than 2% per trade
Stop-loss on EVERY trade before entry
After 2 consecutive losses, stop for the day
Position sizing: account * risk% / stop-loss distance
crypto_trading.halving_cycle: Last halving April 2024, potential peak window Oct 2025 - Oct 2026. We are IN the potential peak zone.

daily_schedule.9am: Create & post content to all platforms

Sakeena.features: Prayer Times, GPS Qibla, Hijri Calendar, Tasbeeh

VooConnect.features: Live streaming, voice messaging, real-time chat

DirectPads.features: Instant cash offers for homes within 24 hours
